paragraph:
# Velmoria, twenty years on

*A truth commission asks whether a nation can (venerate) its past honestly, or only (adulterate) it*

LET THIS chapter not (exaggerate) the distance travelled. Twenty years after the marshal fell, Velmoria has convened a truth commission—its (penultimate) act of national reckoning before the last living witnesses (emigrate) or die. The body's task is (intimate) and exact: to (enumerate) the regime's crimes, to (corroborate) each from the record, and to decide whom history should (venerate), whom (execrate), and whom merely (commiserate) with.

The commission is, by design, (dispassionate). Its members were chosen to be neither (passionate) partisans nor (inveterate) apologists. They mean to (discriminate) the (legitimate) grievance from the (illegitimate), the (proximate) cause from the distant, the (approximate) memory from the documented fact. They will not (denigrate) the dead nor (adulterate) the truth to soothe the living. Their charge is to (illuminate), not to (indoctrinate).

It would be easy to (procrastinate). Some argued the wound should be left to heal, that to reopen it would only (lacerate) old scars and (alienate) a nation that had begun to (integrate). But the commissioners refused to let the question (dissipate). A truth (separate)d from its evidence, they reasoned, soon begins to (disintegrate); a history on which a nation may only (ruminate) in silence does not heal but (ulcerate)s. Better to (deliberate) openly than to let the past (germinate) into myth.

Recall how the marshal treated memory. He sought to (deracinate) it entirely—to (exterminate) inconvenient facts and (disseminate) flattering lies. His ministry would (eliminate) records, (incinerate) archives, and (impersonate) scholarship with propaganda. He longed to (dominate) the very past and (predominate) over its telling, to have himself (denominate)d the nation's saviour and reborn, in the official liturgy, as something (incarnate)—a leader so essential he might be (reincarnate)d in his heirs. The cult was (inordinate); the (effeminate) flattery of his court, ceaseless.

The commission's hearings (fascinate)d the public. Witnesses, long forced to be (subordinate), spoke at last as free citizens. A (literate) clerk produced a ledger that would (inculpate) three former officials and (exculpate) a wrongly blamed fourth. A village elder, of a near-(preliterate) generation, described how soldiers came to (desecrate) the shrine his people had (consecrate)d. The testimony did not (alliterate) into easy poetry; it was raw, (disparate), and all the more credible for it.

Not everyone cooperated. A clique of the marshal's (unregenerate) loyalists rose to (fulminate) against the proceedings, to (vituperate) the commissioners as traitors, to (abominate) the whole exercise as a show trial. They tried to (concatenate) unrelated grievances into a single (inchoate) rage, to (exaggerate) the costs and (denigrate) the motives. One former (magnate), an (ingrate) grown rich on the regime's spoils, (designate)d himself the voice of the wronged—an (illegitimate) claim the evidence quickly (eviscerate)d. He left the chamber (irate), having (corroborate)d nothing.

Beyond the hearings, the republic's ordinary work goes on. Clinics (vaccinate) the young and tend each fragile (neonate); farmers (pollinate), (aerate), and (hydrate) the recovering fields; a generation that knew only the marshal's (dehydrate)d propaganda now learns to (ruminate) for itself. Cooperatives (agglomerate) into a sturdy (conglomerate) of small producers; the economy does not (proliferate) wildly but grows enough to (remunerate) honest labour and (rejuvenate) the long-neglected provinces. No one need (emigrate) merely to eat.

The commission's final report will not be the (consummate), last word—no such thing exists. It will (adumbrate) rather than (elaborate) every detail, leaving later historians to (iterate) and (reiterate) the work. It declines to (incarcerate) the past in a single (crate) of settled judgement. Its authors know that to let one truth (preponderate) over all others would itself (adulterate) the record. They offer, instead, an honest (penultimate) draft of a story still being written.

So Velmoria does not (venerate) itself for its candour, nor (execrate) itself for its failings. The marshal sought to (deracinate) memory and (dominate) the past; his country, twenty years on, has chosen the harder, more (compassionate) course: to (illuminate) what happened, (corroborate) it, and let a free, (literate), self-governing people decide for themselves what to remember and what to forgive. The instinct toward truth, the commissioners concluded, is not learned but (innate)—and it is, in the end, the one inheritance no tyrant can (exterminate).
text:
本批词根亮点：

• -ate 大家族终极篇：consummate/proximate/approximate/intimate，全来自拉丁 -atus 过去分词后缀，名词/形容词/动词三用

• vaccinate：来自拉丁 vacca（母牛），爱德华·詹纳用牛痘预防天花，vaccine=牛的=疫苗，cow/bovine 同根

• fulminate：fulmen（闪电），像雷电一样猛烈抗议，fulminant（爆发性的）同根

• inchoate：in+choate（开始），刚开始还不完整的=初步的，拉丁 incohare=开始耕地

• procrastinate：pro（向前）+ cras（明天），一直推到明天=拖延，procrastination=拖延症

• ruminate：rumen（反刍胃），像牛反刍一样=沉思，ruminant（反刍动物）同根

• decimate：deci（十分之一），每十人杀一人的古罗马军法=大量毁灭，decimal/decade 同根

• emancipate：e+mancipate（手持/所有权），从所有权中解放=解放，manuscript（手写）同根

quiz.question: primate _______
quiz.explanation: 灵长类动物，灵长类动物物种。Scientists have identified over 500 primate species in tropical forests. 科学家已确认热带森林中500多种灵长类动物物种。 | primus->第一（拉丁），primate->第一等的动物=灵长类（cf. prime首要，primary主要，premier首相，primacy首位，primate大主教）

quiz.question: legitimate _____
quiz.explanation: 合法的，合法的要求。The plaintiff presented evidence to support his legitimate claim. 原告提出证据支持他的合法要求。 | leg->法律（拉丁lex），legitimate->符合法律的=合法的（cf. legal合法，legislature立法机关，illegitimate非法，legislation法规）

quiz.question: illegitimate _____
quiz.explanation: 私生的，私生子。In medieval times, an illegitimate child had no rights to inheritance. 在中世纪，私生子没有继承权。 | il->否定，legitimate->合法的，illegitimate->不合法的（cf. legitimate合法，illegal非法，legitimize合法化，bastard私生子）

quiz.question: penultimate _______
quiz.explanation: 倒数第二的，倒数第二章。The penultimate chapter revealed the murderer's identity. 倒数第二章揭示了凶手的身份。 | pen->几乎（拉丁paene），ultimate->最后，penultimate->几乎是最后的=倒数第二（cf. peninsula半岛=几乎是岛，penumbra半影，penury贫困）

quiz.question: intimate ______
quiz.explanation: 亲密的，亲密的朋友。She confided her deepest secrets only to her most intimate friend. 她只向最亲密的朋友吐露最深的秘密。 | intimus->最内部的（拉丁），intimate->最内部的=亲密的（cf. interior内部，internal内部，intimacy亲密，intimidate恐吓=进入内部）

quiz.question: proximate _____
quiz.explanation: 最接近的，近因。The investigation identified driver negligence as the proximate cause of the accident. 调查确定驾驶员疏忽是事故的近因。 | proxim->近（拉丁proximus），proximate->最近的（cf. proximity接近，approximate大约，approximately大约，next下一个）

quiz.question: approximate _____
quiz.explanation: 大约的，近似值。The surveyor could only provide an approximate value for the land. 测量员只能提供该土地的近似值。 | ap->朝向，proxim->近，approximate->朝近处=大约的（cf. proximate最近的，proximity接近，approximation近似值，rough粗略）

quiz.question: consummate ____________
quiz.explanation: 完美的，完美的专业人士。Her dedication made her a consummate professional. 她的奉献精神使她成为完美的专业人士。 | con->完全，summ->最高（拉丁summus），consummate->达到最高点=完美的（cf. summit顶峰，sum总和，consummation完成，assume假设）

quiz.question: alienate __________
quiz.explanation: 疏远，疏远支持者。The politician's remarks threatened to alienate supporters. 政客的言论威胁要疏远支持者。 | alien->外来的（拉丁alienus->他人的），alienate->使变成外来人=疏远（cf. alien外星人，alienation疏离，inalienable不可剥夺）

quiz.question: concatenate _______
quiz.explanation: 连接，连接字符串。The program needs to concatenate strings from multiple sources. 该程序需要将来自多个来源的字符串连接成一个输出。 | con->共同，caten->链（拉丁catena），concatenate->链接在一起（cf. chain链，catenary悬链线，concatenation连接，enchained被锁链）

quiz.question: rejuvenate ____
quiz.explanation: 使恢复活力，使皮肤恢复活力。The new moisturizer claims to rejuvenate skin. 这款新保湿霜声称能使皮肤恢复活力。 | re->再次，juven->年轻（拉丁juvenis），rejuvenate->使再次年轻=恢复活力（cf. juvenile青少年，junior年轻，youth青春，rejuvenation复兴）

quiz.question: ________ magnate
quiz.explanation: 巨头，商业巨头。The business magnate donated millions to charitable causes. 商业巨头向慈善事业捐赠了数百万美元。 | magn->大（拉丁magnus），magnate->权贵大人物（cf. magnificent宏伟，magnify放大，magnitude量级，magnanimous宽宏大量）

quiz.question: designate _ _________
quiz.explanation: 指定，指定继任者。The retiring CEO needed to designate a successor. 即将退休的首席执行官需要指定继任者。 | de->彻底，sign->标记（拉丁signum），designate->标记指定（cf. design设计，signal信号，signature签名，assign分配，resign辞职）

quiz.question: cognate ________
quiz.explanation: 同源的，同源语言。Spanish and Italian are cognate language sharing many common roots. 西班牙语和意大利语是同源语言有许多共同词根。 | co->共同，gnat->出生（拉丁natus），cognate->共同出生=同源的（cf. nature自然，native本地，nascent新生，innate天生，pregnant怀孕）

quiz.question: deracinate _________
quiz.explanation: 根除，根除传统。Rapid modernization threatened to deracinate tradition that had lasted centuries. 快速现代化威胁要根除持续了几个世纪的传统。 | de->去除，racin->根（法语racine），deracinate->连根拔起=根除（cf. radical根本，radish萝卜，eradicate根除，uproot根除）

quiz.question: vaccinate ________
quiz.explanation: 接种疫苗，给儿童接种疫苗。Health officials urged parents to vaccinate children. 卫生官员敦促父母给儿童接种疫苗。 | vacca->母牛（拉丁），vaccinate->用牛痘接种（詹纳用牛痘预防天花，cf. vaccine疫苗，bovine牛的，cow牛，vaccination接种）

quiz.question: fascinate ___ ________
quiz.explanation: 使着迷，使观众着迷。The magician's tricks continued to fascinate the audience. 魔术师的戏法继续使观众着迷。 | fascinum->魔咒（拉丁），fascinate->施加魔咒=使着迷（cf. fascism法西斯=束棒象征，fascination迷恋，captivate迷住）

quiz.question: insubordinate ________
quiz.explanation: 不服从的，不服从的员工。The manager had no choice but to discipline the insubordinate employee. 经理别无选择只能惩戒不服从的员工。 | in->否定，sub->在下，ordin->命令（拉丁），insubordinate->不在命令之下=不服从的（cf. subordinate下属，ordinate坐标，ordain任命）

quiz.question: inordinate _____
quiz.explanation: 过度的，过度的延误。The project suffered from inordinate delay due to bureaucratic obstacles. 项目因官僚障碍遭受了过度延误。 | in->否定，ordin->有序（拉丁ordinatus），inordinate->失去秩序的=过度的（cf. order秩序，ordinary普通，orderly有序，coordinate协调）

quiz.question: pollinate _______
quiz.explanation: 授粉，给花授粉。Bees play a crucial role in helping to pollinate flowers. 蜜蜂在帮助花授粉方面发挥至关重要的作用。 | pollen->花粉（拉丁），pollinate->传播花粉=授粉（cf. pollen花粉，pollinators授粉者，cross-pollination异花授粉）

quiz.question: laminate ________
quiz.explanation: 层压的，层压地板。The homeowners chose durable laminate flooring for the kitchen renovation. 房主为厨房翻新选择了耐用的层压地板。 | lamina->薄板（拉丁），laminate->用薄板层叠=层压的（cf. lamina薄层，laminated层压的，layer层，veneer贴面）

quiz.question: effeminate ______
quiz.explanation: 女性化的，女性化的举止。Critics unfairly described his gentle speech as an effeminate manner. 批评者不公平地将他温和的言谈描述为女性化的举止。 | ef->使，femin->女性（拉丁femina），effeminate->使像女性=女性化的（cf. feminine女性，feminism女权，female女性，femme女性）

quiz.question: disseminate ____
quiz.explanation: 传播，传播信息。Social media platforms can rapidly disseminate info to millions. 社交媒体平台可以迅速向数百万用户传播信息。 | dis->分散，semin->种子（拉丁semen），disseminate->像撒种子一样传播（cf. semen种子，seminary神学院=播种处，seminal开创性的）

quiz.question: eliminate _____
quiz.explanation: 消除，消除浪费。The company implemented lean manufacturing to eliminate waste. 公司实施精益生产以消除浪费。 | e->向外，limin->门槛（拉丁limen），eliminate->把...推出门槛外=消除（cf. preliminary预备=在门槛前，subliminal潜意识，liminal过渡的）

quiz.question: discriminate _______
quiz.explanation: 歧视，歧视。It is illegal for employers to discriminate against applicants based on age. 雇主基于年龄歧视申请人是非法的。 | dis->分开，crimin->分辨（拉丁discernere），discriminate->分辨=区分/歧视（cf. crime犯罪，criminal罪犯，discern辨别，criterion标准）

quiz.question: fulminate _______
quiz.explanation: 强烈抗议，强烈抗议。The senator took to the floor to fulminate against the proposed legislation. 参议员走上讲台强烈抗议拟议的立法。 | fulmen->闪电（拉丁），fulminate->像闪电般猛烈抗议（cf. fulminant爆发性的，thunder雷，lightning闪电，fulmination猛烈谴责）

quiz.question: abominate _______
quiz.explanation: 憎恶，憎恶残忍。People of conscience abominate cruelty toward animals. 有良知的人憎恶对动物的残忍。 | ab->离开，omin->预兆（拉丁omen），abominate->视为不吉预兆=憎恶（cf. omen预兆，ominous不祥，abominable可憎，abomination憎恶）

quiz.question: dominate ______
quiz.explanation: 主导，主导市场。The tech giant continued to dominate market share. 科技巨头继续主导市场份额。 | domin->主人（拉丁dominus），dominate->成为主人=主导（cf. domain领域，dominant主导，dominion统治，domineering专横，dominoes多米诺）

quiz.question: predominate __
quiz.explanation: 占主导地位，占主导地位于。Traditional values still predominate in rural communities. 传统价值观在农村社区仍占主导地位。 | pre->之前，dominate->主导，predominate->在前方主导=占优势（cf. dominant主导，dominate主导，preeminent杰出，prevail盛行）

quiz.question: nominate _ _________
quiz.explanation: 提名，提名候选人。The committee will meet to nominate a candidate for the position. 委员会将开会为该职位提名候选人。 | nomin->名字（拉丁nomen），nominate->用名字指定=提名（cf. name名字，noun名词，denomination命名，nominal名义上的）

quiz.question: denominate ________
quiz.explanation: 以...计价的货币，以...计价的货币。International bonds are often denominate currency in US dollars. 国际债券通常以美元计价。 | de->彻底，nomin->名字，denominate->命名=以...计价（cf. nominate提名，name名字，denomination面额/教派，noun名词）

quiz.question: _____ germinate
quiz.explanation: 发芽，种子发芽。Given proper moisture and warmth, seeds germinate within a few days. 在适当的湿度和温度下，种子会在几天内发芽。 | germen->胚芽（拉丁），germinate->胚芽生长=发芽（cf. germ细菌/胚芽，Germany德国，germane相关，germinal最初的）

quiz.question: indeterminate ____
quiz.explanation: 不确定的，不确定的期限。The contract specified an indeterminate term subject to annual review. 合同规定了一个不确定的需年度审查的期限。 | in->否定，determin->确定（拉丁determinare），indeterminate->无法确定的（cf. determine决定，terminal终端，exterminate消灭，terminus终点）

quiz.question: exterminate _____
quiz.explanation: 消灭，消灭害虫。The farmer hired professionals to exterminate pests. 农民雇佣专业人员消灭害虫。 | ex->向外，termin->终结（拉丁terminus），exterminate->驱出使终结=消灭（cf. terminate终止，terminal终端，determination决心，interminable无休止）

quiz.question: illuminate ___ ____
quiz.explanation: 照亮，照亮道路。Street lamps were installed to illuminate the path through the park. 安装了路灯以在夜间照亮穿过公园的道路。 | il->使，lumin->光（拉丁lumen），illuminate->使有光=照亮（cf. luminous发光，luminary名人，lumen流明，pellucid清澈=透光）

quiz.question: ruminate __
quiz.explanation: 沉思，沉思于。The philosopher would ruminate on questions of existence for hours. 哲学家会沉思存在的问题数小时。 | rumen->反刍胃（拉丁），ruminate->像牛反刍一样深思（cf. ruminant反刍动物，chew反复咀嚼，ponder深思，muse沉思，rumination沉思）

quiz.question: indoctrinate _____
quiz.explanation: 灌输，向青年灌输。The regime used schools to indoctrinate youth with propaganda. 政权利用学校向青年灌输宣传。 | in->进入，doctr->教义（拉丁doctrina），indoctrinate->灌输教义（cf. doctrine教义，doctor博士，docile温顺，document文件）

quiz.question: procrastinate ____
quiz.explanation: 拖延，拖延工作。Students who procrastinate work often face stress as deadlines approach. 拖延工作的学生在截止日期临近时常面临压力。 | pro->向前，cras->明天（拉丁），procrastinate->一直推到明天=拖延（cf. procrastination拖延症，delay推迟，defer推迟，cras=tomorrow）

quiz.question: innate _______
quiz.explanation: 天生的，天生的能力。Mozart demonstrated innate ability for music from an early age. 莫扎特从小就展示了天生的音乐能力。 | in->在内，nat->出生（拉丁natus），innate->出生时就有的=天生的（cf. nature自然，native本地，natal出生，cognate同源，pregnancy怀孕）

quiz.question: neonate ____
quiz.explanation: 新生儿，新生儿护理。The hospital's specialized unit provides intensive neonate care. 医院的专科部门提供重症新生儿护理。 | neo->新（希腊），nat->出生，neonate->新出生的=新生儿（cf. neonatal新生儿的，natal出生，prenatal产前，postnatal产后）

quiz.question: passionate ____
quiz.explanation: 热情的，热情的吻。The romantic scene ended with a passionate kiss. 浪漫场景以热情的吻结束。 | passion->激情（拉丁passio->受苦），passionate->充满激情的（cf. compassion同情，dispassionate冷静，impassioned充满激情，patient忍耐=受苦）

quiz.question: compassionate _____
quiz.explanation: 同情的，同情假。The company granted her compassionate leave to care for her ailing mother. 公司批准了同情假以让她照顾生病的母亲。 | com->共同，passion->受苦，compassionate->共同受苦=同情的（cf. passion激情，compassion同情，patient忍耐，dispassionate冷静）

quiz.question: dispassionate ________
quiz.explanation: 冷静的，冷静的分析。The judge provided a dispassionate analysis of the evidence. 法官对证据进行了冷静的分析。 | dis->去除，passion->激情，dispassionate->去除激情的=冷静的（cf. passionate热情，compassionate同情，impartial公正，objective客观）

quiz.question: impersonate _ _________
quiz.explanation: 模仿，模仿名人。The comedian's ability to impersonate a celebrity made him famous. 喜剧演员模仿名人的能力使他成名。 | im->使，person->人（拉丁persona->面具），impersonate->充当他人=模仿（cf. person人，personality个性，personify拟人化，persona角色）

quiz.question: detonate _ ____
quiz.explanation: 引爆，引爆炸弹。The bomb squad carefully worked to detonate a bomb. 拆弹小组小心翼翼地引爆炸弹。 | de->向下，ton->雷鸣（拉丁tonare），detonate->使雷鸣=引爆（cf. thunder雷，tonic音调，tone音调，detonation爆炸，detonator雷管）

quiz.question: ____ incarnate
quiz.explanation: 化身，邪恶的化身。The villain in the story was portrayed as evil incarnate. 故事中的反派被描绘为邪恶的化身。 | in->进入，carn->肉（拉丁caro），incarnate->进入肉身=化身（cf. carnage大屠杀，carnival嘉年华=肉的节日，carnal肉体的，reincarnation转世）

quiz.question: reincarnate ____
quiz.explanation: 转世，转世的灵魂。Many religions believe that the soul will reincarnate in a new body. 许多宗教相信灵魂会在新的身体中转世。 | re->再次，in->进入，carn->肉，reincarnate->再次进入肉身=转世（cf. incarnate化身，carnival嘉年华，carnal肉体的）

quiz.question: alternate ______
quiz.explanation: 替代的，替代路线。The GPS suggested alternate routes to avoid heavy traffic. GPS建议替代路线以避开拥堵的交通。 | alter->另一个（拉丁alter），alternate->交替的另一个=替代的（cf. alter改变，alternative替代，altercation争吵，altruism利他主义）

quiz.question: inchoate ____
quiz.explanation: 初步的，初步的计划。The startup presented only an inchoate plan to potential investors. 初创公司只向潜在投资者展示了初步的计划。 | in->开始，choate->耕地（拉丁inchoare->开始），inchoate->刚刚开始未完成的=初步的（cf. nascent新生，embryonic萌芽状态，rudimentary基本的）

quiz.question: emancipate ______
quiz.explanation: 解放，解放奴隶。Abraham Lincoln issued a proclamation to emancipate slaves. 林肯发布了解放奴隶的公告。 | e->向外，mancip->手持所有权（拉丁manus+capere），emancipate->从所有权中解放（cf. manuscript手稿，manacle手铐，emancipation解放，manumit释放奴隶）

quiz.question: dissipate ____
quiz.explanation: 消散，消散热量。The cooling system works efficiently to dissipate heat from the engine. 冷却系统有效地消散发动机产生的热量。 | dis->分散，sip->投掷（拉丁sipare），dissipate->分散投出=消散（cf. dissipation消散/放荡，dispel驱散，dissipated放荡的）

quiz.question: inculpate _______
quiz.explanation: 控告，控告嫌疑人。The new evidence served to inculpate suspect in the robbery. 新证据有助于控告抢劫案的嫌疑人。 | in->使，culp->罪（拉丁culpa），inculpate->归罪于=控告（cf. culpable有罪，exculpate开脱，mea culpa我的过失，culprit罪犯）

quiz.question: exculpate ___ _________
quiz.explanation: 开脱，为被告开脱。The defense attorney presented evidence to exculpate the defendant. 辩护律师提出证据为被告开脱。 | ex->向外，culp->罪，exculpate->消除罪责=开脱（cf. inculpate归罪，culpable有罪，mea culpa我的过失，exonerate免罪）

quiz.question: separate ________
quiz.explanation: 分开的，分开的账户。The couple maintained separate accounts after getting married. 这对夫妇结婚后保持分开的账户。 | se->分开，par->准备（拉丁parare），separate->分开准备=分开的（cf. preparate准备，repair修复，part部分，apart分开）

quiz.question: disparate ________
quiz.explanation: 迥异的，迥异的结果。The study revealed disparate outcomes for different demographic groups. 研究揭示了不同人口群体的迥异结果。 | dis->否定，par->相等（拉丁par），disparate->不相等的=迥异的（cf. parity平等，disparity差距，compare比较，separate分开）

quiz.question: adumbrate _ ____
quiz.explanation: 勾画，勾画计划。The executive meeting served to adumbrate a plan for expansion. 高管会议用来勾画扩张计划。 | ad->朝向，umbr->阴影（拉丁umbra），adumbrate->用阴影勾画=概略描述（cf. umbrella雨伞=小阴影，penumbra半影，umbrage不快=被阴影笼罩）

quiz.question: _______ lucubrate
quiz.explanation: 刻苦研究，每夜刻苦研究。The dedicated scholar would nightly lucubrate over ancient manuscripts. 专注的学者每夜都会刻苦研究古代手稿。 | luc->光（拉丁lux），lubrat->工作，lucubrate->在灯光下工作=刻苦研读（cf. lucid清晰，illuminate照亮，translucent半透明，lucent发光）

quiz.question: ______ crate
quiz.explanation: 板条箱，木板条箱。The fragile items were packed carefully in a wooden crate. 易碎物品被小心地装在木板条箱里。 | crate->板条箱（荷兰语krat->格子架），crate->运输用板条箱（cf. grate格栅，grater磨碎器，crate板条箱，cager篮球运动员）

quiz.question: desecrate _ ______
quiz.explanation: 亵渎，亵渎圣地。Vandals attempted to desecrate a shrine sacred to the local community. 破坏者试图亵渎当地社区的圣地。 | de->去除，sacr->神圣（拉丁sacer），desecrate->去除神圣性=亵渎（cf. sacred神圣，consecrate奉献，sacrifice牺牲，sacrilege亵渎）

quiz.question: consecrate ______
quiz.explanation: 使神圣，使土地神圣。The bishop arrived to consecrate ground for the new church. 主教前来使新教堂的土地神圣化。 | con->共同/加强，sacr->神圣，consecrate->使完全神圣（cf. sacred神圣，desecrate亵渎，sacrifice牺牲，sacrosanct神圣不可侵犯）

quiz.question: execrate _______
quiz.explanation: 咒骂，咒骂暴政。Freedom fighters gathered to execrate tyranny and oppression. 自由战士聚集咒骂暴政和压迫。 | ex->向外，secr->神圣（拉丁sacer），execrate->驱出神圣范围=咒骂（cf. execrable极坏，sacred神圣，consecrate奉献，desecrate亵渎）

quiz.question: hydrate ____
quiz.explanation: 使水合，使皮肤水合。Drinking plenty of water helps hydrate skin from within. 喝大量的水有助于从内部使皮肤水合。 | hydr->水（希腊hydor），hydrate->使含水=水合（cf. hydrogen氢=产水，hydraulic液压，dehydrate脱水，carbohydrate碳水化合物）

quiz.question: dehydrate _____
quiz.explanation: 使脱水，使水果脱水。The machine can dehydrate fruit to create healthy snacks. 这台机器可以使水果脱水以制作健康零食。 | de->去除，hydr->水，dehydrate->去除水分=脱水（cf. hydrate水合，rehydrate补水，drought干旱，desiccate使干燥）

quiz.question: _______ carbohydrate
quiz.explanation: 碳水化合物，膳食碳水化合物。Athletes need adequate dietary carbohydrate for energy during training. 运动员在训练期间需要足够的膳食碳水化合物获得能量。 | carbo->碳，hydr->水，carbohydrate->碳与水的化合物（cf. carbon碳，hydrogen氢，hydrate水合，glucose葡萄糖）

quiz.question: aerate ____
quiz.explanation: 使充气，使土壤充气。Gardeners use special tools to aerate soil and improve drainage. 园丁使用特殊工具使土壤充气并改善排水。 | aer->空气（希腊aer），aerate->使充满空气（cf. air空气，aerial空中，aero航空，anaerobic无氧，atmosphere大气层）

quiz.question: deliberate ______
quiz.explanation: 深思熟虑的，深思熟虑的选择。Moving abroad was a deliberate choice after months of planning. 移居国外是经过数月规划后深思熟虑的选择。 | de->彻底，liber->称量/权衡（拉丁librare），deliberate->彻底权衡=深思熟虑的（cf. deliberation审议，libra天秤座，equilibrium平衡）

quiz.question: lacerate ____
quiz.explanation: 撕裂，撕裂皮肤。Sharp thorns can lacerate skin if not handled carefully. 如果不小心处理，尖锐的刺会撕裂皮肤。 | lacer->撕裂（拉丁lacerare），lacerate->撕裂（cf. laceration撕裂伤，tear撕裂，rend撕裂，lacerating撕裂性的）

quiz.question: ulcerate ______
quiz.explanation: 溃烂，使组织溃烂。Prolonged pressure can ulcerate tissue and cause bedsores. 长时间的压力会使组织溃烂并导致褥疮。 | ulc->溃疡（拉丁ulcus），ulcerate->形成溃疡=溃烂（cf. ulcer溃疡，ulcerous溃疡的，erode腐蚀，suppurate化脓）

quiz.question: incarcerate _ _______
quiz.explanation: 监禁，监禁嫌疑人。The judge ordered authorities to incarcerate a suspect pending trial. 法官命令当局在审判前监禁嫌疑人。 | in->进入，carcer->监狱（拉丁），incarcerate->关进监狱=监禁（cf. carceral监狱的，jail监狱，prison监狱，incarceration监禁）

quiz.question: eviscerate ___ ______
quiz.explanation: 削弱，严重削弱预算。Budget cuts threatened to eviscerate the budget for public education. 预算削减威胁要严重削弱公共教育的预算。 | e->向外，viscer->内脏（拉丁viscera），eviscerate->取出内脏=使空洞化/严重削弱（cf. visceral内脏的，gut肠，disembowel取出内脏）

quiz.question: preponderate ____
quiz.explanation: 占优势，占优势于。Practical concerns preponderate over aesthetic ones. 实际考虑占优势于美学考虑。 | pre->之前，ponder->称量（拉丁ponderare），preponderate->在称量中处于前方=占优势（cf. ponderous沉重，pound磅，compensate补偿）

quiz.question: _____ proliferate
quiz.explanation: 增殖，细胞增殖。Cancer occurs when abnormal cells proliferate uncontrollably. 当异常细胞不受控制地增殖时就会发生癌症。 | proli->后代（拉丁proles），ferate->产生，proliferate->大量产生后代=增殖（cf. proletariat无产阶级=只有后代，prolific多产）

quiz.question: exaggerate ______
quiz.explanation: 夸大，夸大声明。Advertisers often exaggerate claims about product effectiveness. 广告商经常夸大关于产品有效性的声明。 | ex->加强，agger->堆（拉丁agger->土堆），exaggerate->堆积过多=夸大（cf. aggrandize扩大，aggregate聚集，exaggeration夸张）

quiz.question: agglomerate _________
quiz.explanation: 聚集，聚集颗粒。The process causes fine particles to agglomerate into larger clumps. 该过程使细小颗粒聚集成较大的团块。 | ag->朝向，glomer->球（拉丁glomus->线团），agglomerate->向球团聚集（cf. conglomerate企业集团，glomerulus肾小球，glomerate聚集）

quiz.question: ________ conglomerate
quiz.explanation: 企业集团，商业企业集团。The multinational business conglomerate owns companies in diverse industries. 跨国商业企业集团拥有多个行业的公司。 | con->共同，glomer->球，conglomerate->球状聚集=企业集团（cf. agglomerate聚集，glomerate集结，amalgamate合并）

quiz.question: enumerate _______
quiz.explanation: 列举，列举原因。The report proceeded to enumerate reasons for the project's failure. 报告继续列举项目失败的原因。 | e->向外，numer->数字（拉丁numerus），enumerate->数出来=列举（cf. number数字，numeral数字，innumerable无数，numerical数字的）

quiz.question: unregenerate ______
quiz.explanation: 不知悔改的，不知悔改的罪人。The preacher spoke of the unregenerate sinner who refused to repent. 传教士谈到了拒绝悔改的不知悔改的罪人。 | un->否定，re->再次，gen->产生（拉丁），regenerate->再生，unregenerate->无法再生=不知悔改的（cf. generate产生，degenerate堕落，regeneration再生）

quiz.question: venerate _________
quiz.explanation: 尊敬，尊敬祖先。Many cultures venerate ancestors through regular ceremonies and offerings. 许多文化通过定期仪式和供品来尊敬祖先。 | vener->崇拜（拉丁venerari），venerate->崇拜=尊敬（cf. Venus金星/维纳斯，venerable可尊敬的，venereal性病=维纳斯的诅咒）

quiz.question: incinerate _____
quiz.explanation: 焚化，焚化废物。The facility was built to incinerate waste and generate electricity. 该设施建成用于焚化废物并发电。 | in->使，ciner->灰烬（拉丁cinis），incinerate->使变成灰烬=焚化（cf. cinderella灰姑娘=灰烬中的姑娘，cinder煤渣，incinerator焚化炉）

quiz.question: exonerate _________
quiz.explanation: 免罪，为被告免罪。DNA evidence helped exonerate defendant wrongly convicted years ago. DNA证据帮助为多年前被错误定罪的被告免罪。 | ex->向外，oner->重担（拉丁onus），exonerate->卸下重担=免罪（cf. onus责任，onerous繁重，exoneration免责，exculpate开脱）

quiz.question: remunerate _______
quiz.explanation: 给报酬，给工人报酬。Companies must fairly remunerate workers for overtime hours. 公司必须为加班时间公平地给工人报酬。 | re->回，muner->礼物/服务（拉丁munus），remunerate->回赠礼物=给报酬（cf. munificent慷慨，munitions军火，immunity免疫=免除服务）

quiz.question: cooperate _______
quiz.explanation: 合作，密切合作。The two departments need to cooperate closely on this project. 两个部门需要在这个项目上密切合作。 | co->共同，oper->工作（拉丁opus），cooperate->共同工作=合作（cf. operate操作，operation手术，opus作品，inoperable无法手术）

quiz.question: recuperate ______
quiz.explanation: 恢复，恢复健康。After the surgery, she went to the countryside to recuperate health. 手术后她去乡下恢复健康。 | re->再次，cup->抓取（拉丁capere），recuperate->再次抓回=恢复（cf. recover恢复，capture抓住，recapture重新夺回，recuperation康复）

quiz.question: vituperate ______
quiz.explanation: 痛骂，疯狂地痛骂。The angry customer began to vituperate wildly about poor service. 愤怒的顾客开始疯狂地痛骂服务差。 | vitu->责备（拉丁vituperare），vituperate->强烈斥责=痛骂（cf. vituperation痛骂，upbraid责备，berate训斥，castigate严厉批评）

quiz.question: commiserate ____
quiz.explanation: 同情，同情于。Friends gathered to commiserate with her after the loss. 朋友们聚在一起对她的损失表示同情。 | com->共同，miser->悲惨（拉丁miser），commiserate->共同悲惨=同情（cf. misery悲惨，miserable悲惨，miser吝啬鬼，commiseration同情）

quiz.question: inveterate _____
quiz.explanation: 根深蒂固的，根深蒂固的习惯。Smoking had become an inveterate habit that he found impossible to break. 吸烟已成为他无法打破的根深蒂固的习惯。 | in->使，veter->老（拉丁vetus），inveterate->由来已久根深蒂固的（cf. veteran老兵，veterinarian兽医，veteran老手，vex困扰）

quiz.question: iterate ___ _______
quiz.explanation: 重复，重复过程。The team needs to iterate the process until they achieve optimal results. 团队需要重复该过程直到获得最佳结果。 | iter->再次（拉丁iterum->再次），iterate->再次做=重复（cf. reiterate重申，iteration迭代，iterative迭代的，algorithm算法）

quiz.question: reiterate ___ _____
quiz.explanation: 重申，重申观点。The professor paused to reiterate the point for emphasis. 教授停下来重申这一观点以示强调。 | re->再次，iter->再次，reiterate->一再重复=重申（cf. iterate重复，iteration迭代，iterative迭代，repeat重复）

quiz.question: literate _______
quiz.explanation: 有文化的，有文化的社会。A literate society enjoys greater economic and social mobility. 有文化的社会享有更大的经济和社会流动性。 | liter->字母（拉丁littera），literate->懂字母的=有文化的（cf. literature文学，literal字面的，illiterate文盲，alliterate押头韵）

quiz.question: preliterate _______
quiz.explanation: 文字出现前的，文字出现前的社会。Anthropologists study preliterate society through oral traditions. 人类学家通过口头传统研究文字出现前的社会。 | pre->之前，literate->有文字的，preliterate->文字出现之前的（cf. literate有文化，illiterate文盲，literature文学，letter字母）

quiz.question: alliterate _____
quiz.explanation: 押头韵，押头韵的词。The poet carefully chose to alliterate words for rhythmic effect. 诗人精心选择押头韵的词以产生韵律效果。 | al->朝向，liter->字母，alliterate->在字母上对齐=押头韵（cf. alliteration头韵，letter字母，literal字面，literate有文化）

quiz.question: adulterate ____
quiz.explanation: 掺假，在葡萄酒中掺假。Unscrupulous merchants would adulterate wine with water to increase profits. 不道德的商人会在葡萄酒中掺水以增加利润。 | adulter->其他的（拉丁adulterare->使不纯），adulterate->加入其他物质=掺假（cf. adultery通奸=加入他者，adulterous不忠的）

quiz.question: integrate _______
quiz.explanation: 整合，整合系统。The IT department worked to integrate systems from different vendors. IT部门努力整合来自不同供应商的系统。 | integr->完整（拉丁integer），integrate->使完整=整合（cf. integer整数，integrity诚信=完整，integral积分，disintegrate瓦解）

quiz.question: disintegrate _______
quiz.explanation: 瓦解，迅速瓦解。Without proper leadership, the organization began to disintegrate rapidly. 没有适当的领导该组织开始迅速瓦解。 | dis->分开，integr->完整，disintegrate->使不完整=瓦解（cf. integrate整合，integrity诚信，integer整数，disintegration瓦解）

quiz.question: emigrate __ ______
quiz.explanation: 移居国外，移居到加拿大。Many families chose to emigrate to Canada for better opportunities. 许多家庭选择移居到加拿大以获得更好的机会。 | e->向外，migr->移动（拉丁migrare），emigrate->向外移动=移居国外（cf. immigrate移入，migrate迁移，migrant移民，migration迁徙）

quiz.question: denigrate _ _________
quiz.explanation: 诋毁，诋毁同事。It is unprofessional to denigrate a colleague in front of clients. 在客户面前诋毁同事是不专业的。 | de->向下，nigr->黑（拉丁niger），denigrate->使变黑=诋毁（cf. negro（已废用），Nigeria尼日利亚，noir黑色，denigration诋毁）

quiz.question: _________ ingrate
quiz.explanation: 忘恩负义的人，忘恩负义的人。After all their help, he turned out to be a thankless ingrate. 在他们提供了所有帮助之后，他竟然是个忘恩负义的人。 | in->否定，grat->感激（拉丁gratus），ingrate->不感激的人（cf. grateful感激，gratitude感激，ungrateful不感激，gratuitous无偿的）

quiz.question: irate ________
quiz.explanation: 愤怒的，愤怒的顾客。The manager had to deal with an irate customer demanding a refund. 经理不得不处理一位要求退款的愤怒顾客。 | ira->愤怒（拉丁），irate->充满愤怒的（cf. ire愤怒，irascible易怒的，ireful愤怒的，enrage激怒）

quiz.question: elaborate ______
quiz.explanation: 精心制作的，精心制作的计划。The criminals devised an elaborate scheme to defraud investors. 罪犯设计了精心制作的计划来欺诈投资者。 | e->向外，labor->工作（拉丁laborare），elaborate->大量工作制作出=精心的（cf. labor工作，laborious费力，collaborate合作，laboratory实验室）

quiz.question: corroborate _________
quiz.explanation: 证实，证实证词。Additional witnesses came forward to corroborate testimony given earlier. 更多证人站出来证实之前给出的证词。 | cor->加强，robor->力量（拉丁robur->橡木），corroborate->加强力量=证实（cf. robust强壮，corroboration证实，oak橡树，robustness坚固）
